# CursorBeam - Remote Control Cursor IDE from Mobile

## Short Description (50 chars)
Remote control Cursor IDE from any mobile device

## Medium Description (160 chars)
Professional PWA for controlling Cursor IDE from mobile. Real-time chat, terminal access, secure authentication. Works anywhere with Tailscale VPN support.

## Long Description (500 chars)
CursorBeam enables you to control Cursor IDE from any mobile device or browser through a secure, mobile-first Progressive Web App. Features include real-time chat synchronization via WebSocket, full terminal access, project switching, AI model selection, and secure password authentication with JWT. Built with TypeScript, Node.js, and Express, it uses Chrome DevTools Protocol for IDE control. Optional Tailscale integration provides encrypted remote access from anywhere. Zero cloud dependencies - all data stays local. Perfect for remote work, home office, and on-the-go development.

## Use Cases
1. Control Cursor IDE from couch or bed
2. Quick code reviews on tablet
3. Monitor long-running tasks from phone
4. Emergency fixes while away from desk
5. Remote access to home development machine
6. Mobile-first development workflows
7. Pair programming from mobile device
8. Live demos from phone

## Technical Highlights
- Real-time WebSocket synchronization
- Sub-100ms latency on local network
- Chrome DevTools Protocol integration
- bcrypt password hashing
- JWT session tokens
- Progressive Web App (installable)
- Dark theme (OLED optimized)
- Touch-optimized interface
- Zero cloud dependencies
- Open source (MIT License)
